titleStmt.title: SII 8.736: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 736. (A.R. No. 420 of 1903). ON THE SAME BASE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭant Aiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉiccelviyu n=ta ṉ perun=te viyarā(k)ki yiṉ
puṟa neṭitiya lūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭu n tuṭarvaṉa velipaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum na
ṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraicartamuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkaṟ ṟe
ṉṉavar vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyu min=ti raṉāramu n=te ṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷar muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ ku
lataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻantivuñ ceruviṟ ciṉavi
l Irupattorukā laracukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=ti maṟ ṟivaraṇ karuti yiruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅ ko
ṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷicca jayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum piṭiya yiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanetikkulappe
rumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭala(m)muṅ kāmiṭavaḷa nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirap
pañcappaḷḷiyum pā(ā)caṭappaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti yātinakaravaiyil can=ti raṉṟolkulat tin=ti rātaṉai viḷaiyamarkka
ḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉak kuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai voṭṭa viṣayamum pūcurarcer nalko
calaināṭu n=ta ṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇṇuṟat tākki tikkaṉaikittit ta
kkaṉalāṭamum kovin=ta can=ta ṉ māviḻan=to ṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaḻaṟcaṅkoṭṭal mayipāḷaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcu
vittaruḷi Oṇṭiral yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalarttirttat teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal
naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic caṅcirāmavijai yottuṅkapanma nāṉa kaṭārattarayaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ pi
ṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavana kaṉakar porttoḻiṟ vācalil vijāti rattoraṇamum moyttoḷippuṉaimaṇip putavamuṅ kanmāṇikkatavaThe record is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 8.736 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
